name: Pastina-Stuffed Avocados
recipeIngredient: 2 Fresh tomatoes, skinned, seeded and chopped
2 Green onions, sliced into thin rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the saffron-infused chicken stock by heating 1/4 cup of chicken stock and steeping the saffron threads for 20 minutes.
2. Cook the pastina in the saffron-infused chicken stock with diced onion until fully cooked.
3. Drain any excess liquid from the pasta and mix well with the remaining ingredients: chopped tomatoes, parsley, green onions, salt, pepper, and vinaigrette.
4. Stuff the prepared mixture into halved avocados.
5. Serve as a main course at lunch or a first course at dinner.
